response.justification: The candidate is a versatile, experienced senior engineer with strong craftsmanship practices (TDD, CI/CD) and some high-throughput systems exposure at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic, but he falls well short of the core minimum qualifications: his C++ experience amounts to roughly a year (National Instruments plus thesis work) versus the required 8 years, and his career centers on web/full-stack development in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang rather than large-scale cloud compute infrastructure. He also lacks formal technical-leadership experience managing cross-team priorities for a platform organization, making him a poor fit for this specific role despite solid general engineering ability.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering experience across web, embedded, and backend systems
Low-latency, high-throughput microservices work handling millions of requests per second
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, mentoring via workshops and courses
concerns: Far below the required 8 years of C++ experience (~1 year, dated to 2015)
Limited large-scale cloud compute platform and infrastructure architecture experience
No formal technical-lead role owning cross-team strategy, priorities, and deliverables
